Why We Exist

Mission & Vision

🎯

Our Mission

To make quality education accessible to every student in India — regardless of their background, city or financial situation — by providing the right information, guidance and connections at the right time.

🌟

Our Vision

To become India's most trusted education ecosystem — where every student from Class 10 onwards can find their path, get mentored by experts and land their dream college with confidence.

What Drives Us

Our Core Values

🤝

Trust First

We never compromise on accuracy. Every college, exam and scholarship data is verified before publishing.

🧠

AI-Powered Guidance

Our AI matches students to colleges and scholarships based on real merit scores and preferences — not ads.

🌍

Inclusive Access

Every student deserves a fair shot. We work hard to support SC/ST/OBC/EWS and first-generation learners.

💬

Real Human Support

AI is great, but real counsellors are irreplaceable. We connect students with verified expert mentors.

₹500+ Crore in scholarships available for 2025–26 · Don't miss your chance!

Free Money for Your
Education 🎓

Find government scholarships, education loans, student credit cards and financial aid — all in one place. Thousands of students miss out every year just because they didn't know.

₹500Cr+

Available annually

60+

Govt schemes

2.4L+

Students helped

0%

Interest (some loans)

🎯

Smart Scholarship Finder

Answer 4 questions → get personalised results in seconds

🏛️ Central Government Scholarships

Direct benefit from Ministry of Education, AICTE, UGC & other central bodies. Apply on scholarships.gov.in portal.

💡 Did you know?

Over ₹2,000 crore in central government scholarships go unclaimed every year because students don't apply. If your family income is below ₹8 lakh, you are almost certainly eligible for at least one central scheme. Apply before the deadline — it takes only 20 minutes.

🏦 Education Loans

Compare bank education loans — interest rates, repayment, moratorium period and how to apply.

🏦

Vidya Lakshmi Portal — Government's #1 Loan Platform

Apply to multiple banks with a single form on vidyalakshmi.co.in. Up to ₹20 lakh without collateral for premier institutions. Interest subsidy available for income below ₹4.5 lakh.

Apply Now

⚡ Central Interest Subsidy Schemes

Dr. Ambedkar Central Sector Scheme

OBC/EWS students · Full interest subsidy during moratorium · Income below ₹4.5L

Padho Pardesh Scheme

Minority communities · Overseas studies · 100% interest subsidy during moratorium

IBA Model Education Loan

All categories · Up to ₹4L without security · ₹4–7.5L with 3rd party guarantee

💳 Student Credit Card & State Credit Schemes

State government student credit cards give you interest-free or low-interest credit for education. This is money you don't need a job or income to get.

💳

⚡ Free Money — Not a Loan Trap

Bihar, West Bengal & UP give students up to ₹4 lakh at just 4% interest — with 0% for girls 👩‍🎓

The Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme, WB Student Credit Card, and similar state schemes exist to ensure no student drops out due to money. You need no collateral, no guarantor and no prior credit history. Just your admission letter.

✓ No Collateral Needed
✓ 0% for Girls
✓ Easy Repayment
✓ 15-Year Tenure

🏧 Student Credit Cards from Banks

Bank / Card Credit Limit Interest Eligibility Best For

📍 State Government Scholarship Schemes

Every state has its own scholarship portal. Click your state to see available schemes and apply directly.

⚠️ Important: State scholarships are often under-applied!

Most state governments have a dedicated scholarship portal for domicile students. Many have 100% fee waivers for SC/ST/OBC students. Even if you got a central scholarship, you can stack state scholarships on top. Apply to both!

🏢 Corporate & NGO Scholarships

Tata, HDFC, Reliance, Infosys and many NGOs offer scholarships. Often less competitive than government ones!

Don't Let Money Stop Your Dream

Our counsellors help you identify, apply for and win scholarships. Book a free 15-min call to find out which schemes you qualify for.
